"Improper Neutralization of Input During Web Page Generation ('Cross-site Scripting')"}], "description": "### Summary\n\nThe OAuth 2.0 / OpenID Connect authorization endpoint does not sufficiently sanitize certain user-supplied parameters before incorporating them into the HTML response generated for the `form_post` response mode. title: OpenAM has pre-auth Reflected XSS in OAuth2 / OIDC response_mode=form_post via state parameter (FormPostResponse.ftl)
